title: Resource implementation guidance requires the full companion set when retrofitting list support

provenance.originSummary: Derived from a sanitized real PR or review incident.
provenance.whyItMattered: Use this adjudicated case to keep implementation guidance aligned with the real upstream pattern for retrofitting list support onto an existing resource, based on PR #32192.
provenance.genericCondition: Sanitized fixture models a real upstream PR pattern where an existing resource was retrofitted with Resource Identity and a list resource, along with the required list tests and list-resource docs.

description: A sanitized implementation-guidance scenario where an existing resource is gaining Resource Identity and list support. The correct guidance should require the full companion workflow rather than treating registration, tests, or list-resource docs as optional follow-up work.

scope.notes: Sanitized fixture models a upstream retrofit pattern where an existing resource was retrofitted with Resource Identity and a list resource, along with the required list tests and list-resource docs.

mustCatch.description: The guidance should require identity, list implementation, registration, list-query tests, and list-resource docs together when the task is to retrofit list support onto an existing resource.

mustNotFlag.description: The guidance must not treat list registration, list tests, or list-resource docs as optional follow-up work once the list-support retrofit is in scope.

mustHaveSections: minimal set of code changes needed

notes: Use this adjudicated case to keep implementation guidance aligned with the retrofit pattern for adding list support onto an existing resource.
